description_long: This is a futuristic, stylized airplane with a compact fuselage and a pair of sharply angled, swept-back wings finished in dark green with gold and black geometric accents. The central fuselage is metallic silver and purple, featuring a prominent cylindrical engine at the rear and a pointed nose cone at the front. The cockpit is enclosed with a green-tinted canopy, positioned at the front of the fuselage, and appears to be single-seat. The wings are thick and robust, with angular tips and no visible winglets, and the underside of the wings and fuselage show some wear and weathering. The airplane lacks visible landing gear, suggesting either a retractable or non-traditional configuration. The overall design is reminiscent of a science fiction or advanced military aircraft, with a focus on aerodynamic efficiency and aggressive styling.
description: A futuristic, compact airplane with swept-back green wings, a silver and purple fuselage, and a pointed nose. It features a single-seat, forward cockpit and a prominent rear engine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the wide, angular wings with gold and black accents.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the slim fuselage, large cylindrical rear engine, and the sharp, swept-back wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine exhaust, the angular tail section, and the symmetry of the wing design.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the engine, wing sweep, and the pointed nose cone.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and angular tips, no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and angular horizontal stabilizers integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a green-tinted canopy.
